name: Gami Discord Recruitment
description: Browser-based Discord DM handler for Gami gaming platform. Monitors Discord web via Chrome CDP — no bot token required. Calls a local LLM for responses and hands over to humans after a configurable turn limit.

maxDmTurns.description: Max AI turns per DM conversation before human takeover. Default: 5

takeoverMessage.description: Message sent to the user when handing over to a human agent.

pollIntervalMs.description: How often (ms) to poll Discord for new DMs. Default: 5000

cdpPort.description: Chrome DevTools Protocol port for the OpenClaw managed browser profile. Default: 18800

llmBaseUrl.description: Base URL for the OpenAI-compatible LLM endpoint. Default: http://192.168.8.201:8080/v1

llmModel.description: Model name to send in LLM requests. Default: default

llmApiKey.description: API key for the LLM endpoint (use 'not-required' if none needed).

systemPrompt.description: System prompt injected at the start of every new DM conversation. Overrides the built-in Gami recruiting prompt.
